panels.description: Chat and completion events by hour of day

targets.rawSql:
SELECT LPAD(CAST(hr AS CHAR), 2, '0') AS 'Hour',
  SUM(chat) AS 'Chat Events', SUM(comp) AS 'Completion Events'
FROM (
  SELECT HOUR(timestamp) AS hr, COUNT(*) AS chat, 0 AS comp
  FROM _tool_q_dev_chat_log WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  GROUP BY HOUR(timestamp)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT HOUR(timestamp) AS hr, 0 AS chat, COUNT(*) AS comp
  FROM _tool_q_dev_completion_log WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  GROUP BY HOUR(timestamp)
) t GROUP BY hr ORDER BY hr

panels.title: AI Activity by Hour of Day (UTC)

panels.description: Average prompt complexity and response richness by hour

targets.rawSql:
SELECT LPAD(CAST(HOUR(timestamp) AS CHAR), 2, '0') AS 'Hour',
  ROUND(AVG(prompt_length)) AS 'Avg Prompt Length',
  ROUND(AVG(response_length)) AS 'Avg Response Length'
FROM _tool_q_dev_chat_log
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY HOUR(timestamp)
ORDER BY HOUR(timestamp)

panels.title: Prompt & Response Length by Hour

panels.description: Steering and spec mode usage concentration by hour

targets.rawSql:
SELECT LPAD(CAST(HOUR(timestamp) AS CHAR), 2, '0') AS 'Hour',
  SUM(CASE WHEN has_steering = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Steering',
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_spec_mode = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Spec Mode',
  SUM(CASE WHEN has_steering = 0 AND is_spec_mode = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 'Plain Chat'
FROM _tool_q_dev_chat_log
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
GROUP BY HOUR(timestamp)
ORDER BY HOUR(timestamp)

panels.title: Feature Usage by Hour

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE DAYOFWEEK(timestamp)
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Sun' WHEN 2 THEN 'Mon' WHEN 3 THEN 'Tue'
    WHEN 4 THEN 'Wed' WHEN 5 THEN 'Thu' WHEN 6 THEN 'Fri' WHEN 7 THEN 'Sat'
  END AS 'Day',
  SUM(chat) AS 'Chat Events', SUM(comp) AS 'Completions'
FROM (
  SELECT timestamp, COUNT(*) AS chat, 0 AS comp FROM _tool_q_dev_chat_log WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY timestamp
  UNION ALL
  SELECT timestamp, 0, COUNT(*) FROM _tool_q_dev_completion_log WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY timestamp
) t
GROUP BY DAYOFWEEK(timestamp)
ORDER BY DAYOFWEEK(timestamp)

panels.title: AI Activity by Day of Week
